Content: What courses do I need for graduation?

Alex, as a Computer Science Major (B.S.), based on the provided bulletin content, you need to complete the following required courses:

*   MATH 215 - Survey of Calculus (3 credits) OR MATH 230 - Calculus I (4 credits)
*   BCOM 231 - Business Communication (3 credits) OR ENG 317 - Technical Writing (3 credits)
*   CS 215 - Discrete Structures for Computer Science (3 credits)
*   CS 258 - Introduction to Object-Oriented Programming Using C# (3 credits)
*   CS 311 - Data Structures and Analysis of Algorithms (3 credits)
*   CS 321 - Architecture (course name is truncated in the provided content)

The bulletin indicates the major requires 64-65 hours total, with 52-53 hours in "Required Courses." The list above is a partial set of these required courses, as the provided content is incomplete.
